titleStmt.title: SII 19.391: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 391. (A.R. No. 702 of 1909.) TUṞAIYŪR, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT. ON THE gōpura OF THE CHŌḶĪŚVARA TEMPLE, RIGHT OF ENTRANCE.

summary.p: The writing of this inscription may be assigned to the 12th century A.D. It registers the sals of a quarter vēli of land called the Madhurāntakaṉ-mayakkal, to the temple of Tiruvālīśvaram-uḍaiya-Mahādēva at Tuṟaiyūr in Kīḻpilāṟu a subdivision of Pāchchil-kūṟṟam in Maḻa-nāḍu on the northern bank of the river, by the ūrār of the village for 25 kaḻañju of gold. This amount seems to have represented only the lump payment in lieu of the taxes, as the land was lying fallow and was to be brought under cultivation by the temple after its purchase, to meet the expenses of the festival Vaigāśi-Viśākam.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecaripanmaṟku yāṇṭu 10 5- vatin Etirāmāṇṭu vaṭakarai maḻanāṭṭup pāccilkū
ṟṟattuk kiḻpilāṟṟut tuṟaiyūrt tiruvāliccuramuṭaiya mahādevarkku Ittuṟaiyūr Ūrom
nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Ivvūr ttālil Oṭaiyum Uṭaippumāy varam
pukeṭṭu variyil mara pāḻkiṭantu ṉnilam maturāntakamayakkal E
ṉṟu mayakkik koḷḷak kuṭutta maturāntakamayakkalu kellai neṭuṅkālceykku meṟkum
teṉpāṟkellai paiṅkaṇikkum pirappañcey Araikkālukku vaṭakkum mipāṟkellai Araiye mākāṇi
kku Eḻumāvukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai pattucceykkut teṟkum perunānkel
laiyuḷ mikutikkuṟaivu Akappaṭa maturāntakaṉ mayakkal nilam kālum vaikāci vicākattukku Iṟaiyili muṟ
ṟūṭṭu Uṇṇa viṟṟukkuṭuttuk koṇṭa vilaipporuḷ tippokkuccempon kaḻañcil perttat tuḷai kallā
l koṇṭa poṉmutal Irupattaiṅkaḻañcu poṉṉum tevakaṉmi Iṭṭu niruppiccukkoṇṭu Iṟaiyili
muṟṟūṭṭuṇpatākavum viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytukuṭuttom Ippoṉṉukku Ituve poruḷ māvaṟutip
poruṭcelavolai Āvatākavum maṟ poruṭcelavolai kāṭṭātatākavum Iṉṉilattāl Aḷan
ṉṟum Iṟātatākavum Ipparice Iṟaiyili muṟṟūṭṭuṇṇap poruḷ Aṟak koṇṭu vilaiaṟa vi
Digital edition of SII 19.391 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
